title: Pirates on Horseback
writer: Clarence E. Mulford, Ethel La Blanche, J. Benton Cheney
actors: William Boyd, Russell Hayden, Andy Clyde
plot: Hoppy, Lucky and California search for a mine owned by Trudy Pendleton after it was taken from her by the swindling gambler Ace Gibson. They find the mine and Hoppy fights Gibson over it.
